title: Application exhibits no response on Android platform
description: The application on the Android platform fails to respond, as indicated by the absence of any relevant logs.
steps: Launch the application on the Android device.
Perform various user interactions within the application.
Observe the system logs for any corresponding entries or error messages.
actual: No logs are generated, and the application appears unresponsive.
expected: The application should be responsive, and logs should be generated reflecting user interactions and application status.
